offer: For accounting firms managing 5–15 clients/month, inefficient generation of depreciation schedules causes delayed reporting. We automate the generation of monthly depreciation schedules instead of manual calculations and spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient generation of depreciation schedules leads to delayed reporting.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums where accounting firms share tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
